reason: The tweet uses ISIS terminology like 'asood al-dawla al-islamiyya' (lions of the Islamic State) and refers to Benghazi as 'maqbarat al-murtaddeen' (graveyard of apostates), which is typical ISIS rhetoric against opponents.
